series_metadata.series_description: The Attorney General Certification Files are packets that are prepared when the BWC is a party to a complaint. The Attorney General Certification Files include certification memos for claims certified to the Attorney General (AG), copies of complaints, and responses to pleadings where the responses were generated by the BWC subrogation unit. The Closed Subrogation Cases are scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS). The Universal Document Service (UDS) is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Hold records in Subrogation Unit case is closed and ; Electronic: Review machine readable information every ensure that files can still be accessed. Maintain in UDS subrogation database 20 years
